tools.name: get_competitive_profile
tools.description: Use when the user asks who competes with a company, what a competitor recently did, or for a competitive overview of a domain. Input a company domain or name and get a privacy-safe profile: firmographics, recent strategic moves (the existence of a shift + a was→now summary, with the real analysis da

tools.name: list_competitor_moves
tools.description: Recent tracked strategic moves for one competitor, newest-first — the existence of each shift plus a was→now summary and the real analysis date (never a fabricated date). Returns { covered: false } for companies IndustryLens doesn't publicly track, and an empty list for covered companies with no mov

tools.name: find_competitors
tools.description: Given a company domain or name, return the other companies IndustryLens tracks in the same market. Returns { covered: false } for companies not publicly tracked.

tools.name: list_reports
tools.description: Browse published competitive-intelligence reports. Filter by industry or target_role; results are ordered newest-first. Each returned item has a slug usable with get_report. URLs follow https://industry-lens.com/reports/<slug>.

tools.name: get_report
tools.description: Fetch the full body of a published report by slug. Returns the report's structured fields plus content_html (the canonical body). For a PDF, use pdf_url when present, or append .pdf to the URL.

tools.name: list_comparisons
tools.description: Browse published competitor-vs-competitor breakdowns. Optionally filter by a competitor name (matches either side). Each item has a slug usable with get_comparison. URLs follow https://industry-lens.com/compare/<slug>.

tools.name: get_comparison
tools.description: Fetch the full structured body of a published competitor comparison by slug. Returns content_json (the structured breakdown: pricing, recent moves, positioning, displacement signals, when-to-choose, etc.) plus metadata.

tools.name: subscribe_to_newsletter
tools.description: Sign the user up for IndustryLens's weekly intelligence-report newsletter. Use this only after the user explicitly asks to subscribe — never subscribe an email without their direct, informed consent. The source argument is recorded for attribution and defaults to 'mcp'.

findings.title: Toxic flow: untrusted input can reach an external sink
findings.detail: Server "public" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: list_reports, get_report, list_comparisons · Public sink: subscribe_to_newsletter.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: list_reports, get_report, list_comparisons · Public sink: subscribe_to_newsletter

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.

labels.name: list_markets
labels.description: List the B2B SaaS markets (categories) IndustryLens monitors. Each item has a `slug` usable with get_market_landscape for the full category map. Ordered by name.

labels.name: get_market_landscape
labels.description: Given a market (a vertical slug or name), return the published category overview plus every player IndustryLens tracks in that market — the whole-CATEGORY map, not a self-selected competitor set. Returns the hub (title, abstract, tldr, hero_stats, url), the deduped list of players (name, domain, bus

findings.title: Toxic flow: untrusted input can reach an external sink
findings.detail: Server "public" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: list_reports, get_report, list_comparisons, get_competitor_moves_diff, get_pricing_changes, get_market_landscape · Public sink: subscribe_to_newsletter.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: list_reports, get_report, list_comparisons, get_competitor_moves_diff, get_pricing_changes, get_market_landscape · Public sink: subscribe_to_newsletter

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
